THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PETITIONER MAIN STREET BUSINESS LOANS, LLC RECOVER FROM RESPONDENT MARKET VENTURES CORP. A CORPORATION DBA GOLD MARKET REFINERS ODEH, MUSA A. $149,611.19 PRINCIPAL, $2,825.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $5,451.67 INTEREST, TOTAL JUDGMENT $157,887.86, SEE SCANNED DOC

LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER MAIN STREET BUSINESS LOANS, LLC'S PETITION TO CONFIRM CONTRACTUAL ARBITRATION AWARD IS GRANTED, NO OPPOSITION FILED. ORDER AND JUDGMENT SIGNED. JUDGE ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH; CLERK FELICIA GREEN; DEPT. 302. (302/EHG)

Notice Of Hearing On Petition And Motion To Confirm Contractual Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Jul-15-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances in the matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: PETITIONER MAIN STREET BUSINESS LOANS, LLC'S Petition To Confirm Contractual Arbitration Award is granted, no opposition filed. Order and Judgment signed. Judge Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk Felicia Green; Dept. 302. (302/EHG)
